description: Evaluates strategy.md section by section. Rates positioning, ICP, channels, messaging. Forces alternative approaches. NOT for reviewing content pieces.

cases.query: I just finished my strategy.md. Can you review it and tell me if my positioning is strong enough? I feel like it might be too generic.
Review my marketing strategy. I want to know if my ICP section is concrete enough or if I'm targeting too broad an audience.
Poke holes in my plan. I wrote a go-to-market strategy yesterday and I want someone to challenge every assumption before I start executing.
Is my strategy good? I picked Twitter and LinkedIn as my channels but I'm not sure those are the right ones for a developer tool.
CMO review please. I need a senior marketing eye on my strategy before I start creating content. Especially worried about the messaging pillars.
Challenge my marketing. I have strategy.md done but I've been heads-down building and I'm worried I have blind spots in my positioning.
Strategy check. I want to make sure my differentiation actually holds up against the competitors I identified. What am I missing?
What am I missing in my marketing approach? I wrote the strategy but it feels too safe. I want you to push back on the weak parts.
Can you evaluate my strategy.md and rate each section? I need to know which parts are strong and which need rework before I build a content calendar.
I need a second opinion on my marketing strategy. The positioning feels right but I'm not confident the channel choices match my ICP's actual behavior.
Give me a brutally honest assessment of my go-to-market plan. I'd rather hear the hard truth now than waste a month executing a weak strategy.
My strategy has been sitting untouched for a week. Before I start writing posts, I want someone to stress-test the messaging pillars and channel selection.
I just wrote a LinkedIn post about our launch. Can you review it before I publish? I want to make sure the CTA is clear and the tone matches our brand.
Check this thread I drafted for X. Is it ready to post? The hook feels weak and I'm not sure the last tweet lands right.
Review my content before I publish it. I wrote three posts this morning and I want to make sure they align with our brand voice.
Is this blog post ready to go live? I need someone to check the messaging, CTA, and whether it fits the channel format.
How should I market my new CLI tool? I have no strategy yet and I need help figuring out positioning and who to target.
What should I post this week? I have my strategy done but I need a content calendar with specific topics and a posting schedule.
Write me a launch tweet thread. I know what I want to say, I just need the actual content drafted.
Who are my competitors in the dev tools space? I need a competitive landscape before I finalize my positioning.
Who is my ideal customer? I'm building a code review tool but I'm not sure if I should target individual devs or engineering managers.
I want to review what worked in our marketing last month. Pull up the metrics and give me a retrospective.
Publish this post to X right now. It's been reviewed and approved.
